Sergi Roberto: "My mother has ALS. It is a difficult situation that changes your vision of life. Until you touch it up close you do not know it. It is a degenerative disease and, fortunately, it is stable. The most important thing is the health of the people close to you."

"At home my parents always told me that the most important thing was to study, I started Business Administration, but football became serious and now I have the study parked."

"I'll see if I resume the study when I leave football. Good student? Yes. There were better than me, but I was not a bad one, I arrived at Barça at the age of 14, but at La Masia I entered at the age 16 because my parents wanted me to finish secondary education in Reus."

"At 18 I already shared a flat with Marc Muniesa, Sergi Gómez and then Mauro Icardi arrived, with an iguana... The cook was Sergi Gómez."

"The hardest part at La Masia? Seeing friends who do not remain at the club and you have that in your head to not lose perspective. I made very good friendships and many came to my wedding in Israel last year."

"There is nothing negative about playing at Barça, nor popularity because I live a normal life and people are respectful when they get close. Of course, I'm not Leo, who can not leave the house..."

"The 6-1 against PSG was my best moment at Barça, I'm not scoring many goals and I repeated it many times because I did not believe it, too bad we did not get the Champions League. Let's see if this year we will win it."

"Madrid asked for me when I was at Nàstic when I was a child, but Barça spoke with my father after a few days and we decided to go there. My parents were also excited, although my father was from Madrid. Going to Barcelona was a dream come true." [tv3]

http://cablenews.i-cable.com/ci/videopage/news/546886/%E5%8D%B3%E6%99%82%E6%96%B0%E8%81%9E/%E6%AD%90%E8%81%AF%E5%85%AB%E5%BC%B7%E6%AC%A1%E5%9B%9E%E5%B7%B4%E5%A1%9E%E7%BE%85%E9%82%A33%EF%BC%9A0%E6%9B%BC%E8%81%AF
歐聯八強次回合，巴塞羅那有美斯攻入兩球及古天奴的世界波，主場大勝曼聯三比零，兩回合計淨勝四球。

巴塞首回合只是贏一比零，回到主場未能安心，曼聯的拉舒福特偷到位，三十多秒，一推一射中橫楣，曼聯禁區有接觸，費特落腳，拉傑迪跌低了，球證堅定直指十二碼，鏡頭無處不在，真相無所遁形，球證去場邊看過重播，決定改變主意，沒有十二碼。

曼聯在十六強次回合絕地反擊淘汰聖日耳門，機會只怕沒那麼多，拉舒福特有點腳滑，未能把握，艾殊利楊格一扣再解圍被截到，飛剷補救都差半步，落在美斯腳下，推大位起腳，十六分鐘巴塞開紀錄，惟獨美斯不可取替，一次機會就為巴塞入球，連一向令人心安的迪基亞都犯了天下門將都會犯的錯，美斯射門竟然漏入了，二十分鐘連入兩球，很丟臉、很陌生的迪基亞，做錯一刻或者沒有了靈魂，給時間他找回自己吧。雨後陽光，迪基亞上半場補時救走必入球，封走沙治奧羅拔圖射空門，移位夠快，近距離硬接一招，曼聯今屆歐聯只好煞科。

換邊後，古天奴發熱發亮拉出世界波，弧線這樣難捉摸，在迪基亞手頂過，六十一分鐘，三比零，總比數贏到四球，曼聯還好嗎？還有美斯倒掛柱邊出底線，總算沒那麼傷，達洛特傳中山齊士頭槌，達史迪根救到，紅魔鬼曼聯未能破蛋，美斯補時階段過不到迪基亞，巴塞結果淨勝三球，兩回合計贏四比零降魔，安心準備四強，鬥利物浦跟波圖的勝方。

i雞堡
